queries.question: List drugs and their side effects in order of their popularity in prescriptions
queries.sql: Select Drug.Name, Side_Effects.EffectText, Side_Effects.Severity FROM Side_Effects INNER JOIN Drug On Side_Effects.sideEffectId = Drug.SideEffectId JOIN Prescription ON Prescription.drugID = Drug.drugID ORDER BY quantity
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?effecttext ?severity WHERE {
  ?side_effects a :Side_Effects .
  ?drug a :Drug .
  ?drug p:hasSide_Effects ?side_effects .
  ?prescription a :Prescriptions .
  ?prescription p:hasDrug ?drug .
  ?drug p:name ?name .
  ?side_effects p:effectText ?effecttext .
  ?side_effects p:severity ?severity .
  ?prescription p:quantity ?quantity_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?quantity_o)

queries.question: List the drugs and the percentage of their effectiveness.
queries.sql: Select Drug.Name, Effectiveness.percentage FROM Effectiveness INNER JOIN Drug On Effectiveness.EffectivenessId = Drug.EffectivenessId
queries.sparql:

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?percentage WHERE {
  ?effectiveness a :Effectiveness .
  ?drug a :Drug .
  ?drug p:hasEffectiveness ?effectiveness .
  ?drug p:name ?name .
  ?effectiveness p:percentage ?percentage .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List drugs and their effects in order of their popularity in prescriptions
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?name ?effecttext ?severity WHERE {
  ?side_effects a :Side_Effects .
  ?drug a :Drug .
  ?drug p:hasSide_Effects ?side_effects .
  ?prescription a :Prescriptions .
  ?prescription p:hasDrug ?drug .
  ?drug p:name ?name .
  ?side_effects p:effectText ?effecttext .
  ?side_effects p:severity ?severity .
  ?prescription p:quantity ?quantity_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?quantity_o) }
  full: { SELECT ?name ?effecttext ?severity ?percentage WHERE {
  ?side_effects a :Side_Effects .
  ?drug a :Drug .
  ?drug p:hasSide_Effects ?side_effects .
  ?prescription a :Prescriptions .
  ?prescription p:hasDrug ?drug .
  ?effectiveness a :Effectiveness .
  ?drug p:hasEffectiveness ?effectiveness .
  ?drug p:name ?name .
  ?side_effects p:effectText ?effecttext .
  ?side_effects p:severity ?severity .
  ?effectiveness p:percentage ?percentage .
  ?prescription p:quantity ?quantity_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?quantity_o) }
  component_2: { SELECT ?name ?percentage WHERE {
  ?effectiveness a :Effectiveness .
  ?drug a :Drug .
  ?drug p:hasEffectiveness ?effectiveness .
  ?prescription a :Prescriptions .
  ?prescription p:hasDrug ?drug .
  ?drug p:name ?name .
  ?effectiveness p:percentage ?percentage .
  ?prescription p:quantity ?quantity_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?quantity_o) }
}
